arts.ttl: Inzaghi: “The Supercoppa is a major objective. Atalanta? Past results don’t play on the field”
arts.sum: On the eve of the Inter-Atalanta Supercoppa match, Inter Milan coach Simone Inzaghi shared his thoughts in a press conference. The match, scheduled for Thursday evening in Riyadh, marks the first semifinal of the second edition of the four-team Italian Supercoppa. Inter has won the last three editions of this competition. The post Inzaghi: “The Supercoppa is a major objective. Atalanta? Past results don’t play on the field” appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Gasperini: “Inter are the strongest team, but we want to win”
arts.sum: On the eve of the Supercoppa match in Riyadh, Atalanta's coach Gian Piero Gasperini shared his thoughts in a press conference. The match between Atalanta and Inter Milan is scheduled for Thursday, January 2nd, marking the first of two semi-finals. This is Atalanta's debut in this competition. The post Gasperini: “Inter are the strongest team, but we want to win” appeared first on FootItalia.com.

Former Inter and Napoli coach Rafa Benitez talked to Gazzetta dello Sport about the upcoming Italian SuperCoppa semi-finals. The post Benitez: “Inter-Atalanta is a luxury semi-final’ appeared first on FootItalia.com.
